title: Bootstrap correlation engine, rule database, and feed sync primitives
description: Build the first usable version of RapidTriage's proprietary correlation subsystem as a workspace crate with strict TDD.

acceptance_criteria.text: The crate exposes a correlation engine that can join cross-source evidence on subject and time window.
Correlation rules can be loaded from YAML files instead of being hardcoded in Rust branches.
The bundled rule pack contains miner, reverse-shell, tunnel, and persistence-oriented rules with source references.
Rule clauses can match evidence attributes directly so detection logic can live in data.
The crate can render latest-feed URLs and materialize downloaded archives for Sigma, YARA, Suricata, and Zeek sources.
Sync metadata can be persisted and loaded deterministically for later integration with rt-cli and rt-navigator.
Downstream RapidTriage commands can evaluate loaded evidence against bundled and custom correlation rule packs.
Feed synchronization is exercised against live upstream sources and imported into rule-source bookkeeping.
